metadata.value: Strength in Trust OneTrust’s mission is to enable organizations to use data and AI responsibly. Our platform simplifies the collection of data with consent and preferences, automates the governance of data with integrated risk management across privacy, security, IT/tech, third-party, and AI risk, and activates the responsible use of data by applying and enforcing data policies across the entire data estate and lifecycle. OneTrust supports seamless collaboration between data teams and risk teams to drive rapid and trusted innovation. Recognized as a market pioneer and leader, OneTrust boasts over 300 patents and serves more than 14,000 customers globally, ranging from industry giants to small businesses.  The Challenge As OneTrust continues to scale its global sales development organization, we need an innovative and execution-focused xDR Global Enablement Manager to drive the enablement strategy for our global xDR (SDR, BDR) teams. You’ll play a critical role in developing the programs, tools, and learning paths that enable our xDRs to become world-class pipeline generators—and future Account Executives.  Your Mission Design and deliver a globally consistent, regionally nuanced enablement strategy that increases XDR productivity, drives skill mastery across prospecting and discovery, and cultivates a strong talent pipeline for SMB and Mid-Market AE roles.  You’ll own enablement across onboarding, continuous learning, and professional development—while also building the flagship OneTrust Ascend Program, a fast-track initiative to promote high-potential SDRs and BDRs into AE roles.  You Are A builder and doer who can own programs end-to-end—from ideation to execution. A strategic thinker with the ability to tailor content across geographies and personas. Passionate about helping early-career sellers grow into exceptional sales professionals. Proficient in MEDDPICC, prospecting best practices, and Layered Discovery. Comfortable operating in a fast-paced, dynamic global environment with multiple stakeholders.  About the Role Own the global enablement strategy for xDRs across regions, ensuring alignment with OneTrust sales processes, messaging, and methodologies. Collaborate on role-based learning/xDR Onboarding Track Develop and deliver learning paths for BDR and SDR roles, focused on layered discovery, value creation, urgency building, technical and executive persona engagement, and rigorous use of Salesforce. Build and scale the OneTrust Ascend Program, a fast-track development path for high-potential xDRs to prepare for AE roles. Partner with Sales Leadership, Revenue Operations, and Learning & Development to design onboarding and upskilling experiences that accelerate ramp and performance. Lead the execution of NTR (Net New Revenue) enablement strategy, balancing global consistency with local adaptation. Continuously innovate enablement delivery formats, from live sessions to on-demand content, self-paced learning, and certifications. Measure enablement impact using performance data, behavioral KPIs, and xDR Leader feedback to iterate and improve programs.  Qualifications & Experience 5+ years in Sales Enablement, Sales Development Leadership, or Learning & Development roles supporting commercial sales functions. Experience building and executing global enablement programs with regional alignment. Deep understanding of prospecting workflows, discovery skills, qualification frameworks, and sales process adherence. Familiarity with methodologies (MEDDPICC), Salesforce CRM, and enablement tools (e.g., CMS/LMS, SalesLoft, LinkedIn Sales Nav, 6Sense, ZoomInfo, etc.). Strong instructional design and facilitation capabilities. High EQ, cross-functional collaboration skills, and a proactive, accountable work ethic.  Why Join Us This is your opportunity to help shape the future of OneTrust’s sales talent. You'll have a direct impact on pipeline generation, sales career development, and overall business growth. Join a high-performing team, bring your ideas to life, and help build the bench of tomorrow’s top Account Executives
